title: The Milk Expansion
description: This mod adds and expansion to milk! including CHEESE!
body:
# Welcome to the official mod page of the Milk Expansion mod!

This mod adds an expansion to milk in minecraft! Including (Drum rolls) **CHEESE**

## Crafting Recipes:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Smelting Recipe for Cheese bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19ce8a5de8105f2ceb429b80b5c8ead76e559cdb.png)
Cheese bucket


</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Cooler Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ada5f1f95a6e4efb20ac4a9aacb612d17656bbd.png)
Cooler recipe


</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Cheese Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90ee2e7ce6595ad62fe45ad8adecc8e9ca8828e0.png)

</details>

![Ice shard Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9070e65569ae0867043803a3d47bf0745274843.png)

</details>


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Brewing for Freezing Potion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2795bb0073955206994c4f3107f70edff8e5d80.png)

## Items that was added in Update 1.1.0 

1. A Pebble
1. Cheddar Cheese
1. Milk Dough
1. Flour
1. Wheat Dough
1. Oak Crate

### Tutorial for Cooler!

Use:
it is used to make Hardened milk (Frozen Milk) which is used to make Cheese.

How to use:

Step 1- Put ice Shard on the bottom slot in the cooler

Step 2- put a milk bucket in the top slot of the cooler

Step 3- Press the cool button

and thats it! you have yourself some Hardened (Frozen) Milk!

Hope you Enjoy the mod, Currently this mod is on its first version and theres not much content but there are more updates guaranteed to be Released!


Use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei/version/C7nTY0fi) for Easy Crafting recipe access
